ports.rationale: Filesystem serves both access patterns; git is history and audit trail
Zero cost, CDN-backed, native to the repo's home
Runs the gate and build on the trust boundary; free tier suffices
No product integration by design; subscription pricing constraint
Renders in-browser from fenced source; no build-time browser dependency
No interface at MVP; sidebar is the index until ~25 topics
The product collects nothing about readers
